panels.title: Sessions per day
panels.description: Distinct session_id per day. Filtered to $environment, excludes internal staff when $internal=false.

url_options.data: SELECT toStartOfDay(timestamp) AS day, count(DISTINCT index1) AS sessions FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'session_start' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Platform × OS breakdown
panels.description: Distinct sessions, grouped by platform (web/desktop/mobile) and os family.

url_options.data: SELECT blob10 AS platform, blob9 AS os, count(DISTINCT index1) AS sessions FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'session_start' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY platform, os ORDER BY sessions DESC

panels.title: Layer load p95 — top 25 datasets
panels.description: p50 and p95 load time per dataset, network/HLS only (cache hits excluded).

url_options.data: SELECT blob5 AS layer_id, quantile(0.50)(double2) AS p50_ms, quantile(0.95)(double2) AS p95_ms, count() AS load_count FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'layer_loaded' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND blob6 != 'cache' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY layer_id HAVING load_count > 10 ORDER BY p95_ms DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Load source mix
panels.description: How layers were loaded — network fetch vs local cache vs HLS vs raw image.

url_options.data: SELECT blob6 AS source, count() AS loads FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'layer_loaded' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY source ORDER BY loads DESC

panels.title: Errors per session (last 24h)
panels.description: Total error events divided by distinct session count. Production-only; staff sessions excluded.

url_options.data: WITH s AS (SELECT count(DISTINCT index1) AS n FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'session_start' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '1' DAY), e AS (SELECT count() AS n FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'error' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '1' DAY) SELECT e.n / s.n AS errors_per_session FROM s, e

panels.title: Errors by category × source
panels.description: Last 7 days of error events, grouped by classified category and originating source.

url_options.data: SELECT blob5 AS category, blob8 AS source, count() AS occurrences FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'error' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY category, source ORDER BY occurrences DESC

panels.title: 2D map FPS over time (median, by GPU bucket)
panels.description: Per-hour median fps from the perfSampler, split by webgl_renderer_hash. Top buckets reveal whether a GPU class is regressing.

url_options.data: SELECT toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS hour, blob6 AS gpu_bucket, quantile(0.50)(double2) AS median_fps FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'perf_sample' AND blob5 = 'map' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY hour, gpu_bucket ORDER BY hour

panels.title: VR sessions — funnel + end-of-session FPS
panels.description: Per device_class × mode: count, average entry-load latency, p50 of mean_fps at session end. mean_fps is the arithmetic mean over the whole session; for in-session medians query perf_sample.

url_options.data: SELECT blob6 AS device_class, blob7 AS mode, count() AS sessions, avg(double2) AS avg_entry_load_ms, quantile(0.50)(double3) AS p50_session_mean_fps FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'vr_session_ended' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY device_class, mode ORDER BY sessions DESC

panels.title: Tour completion rates
panels.description: Started vs completed counts per tour_id; outcome='abandoned' / 'error' both excluded from completes.

url_options.data: WITH starts AS (SELECT blob6 AS tour_id, count() AS n FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'tour_started' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY tour_id), completes AS (SELECT blob6 AS tour_id, count() AS n FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'tour_ended' AND blob5 = 'completed' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY tour_id) SELECT starts.tour_id, starts.n AS starts, COALESCE(completes.n, 0) AS completes, COALESCE(completes.n, 0) / starts.n AS completion_rate FROM starts LEFT JOIN completes ON starts.tour_id = completes.tour_id ORDER BY starts DESC

panels.title: Country breakdown (top 20)
panels.description: Distinct sessions per country (2-letter ISO from CF-IPCountry). 'XX' (Tor / unknown) excluded.

url_options.data: SELECT blob3 AS country, count(DISTINCT index1) AS sessions FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'session_start' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND blob3 != 'XX' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY country ORDER BY sessions DESC LIMIT 20
